why_this_action.reasoning: The comparison matrix deployed at 15:38 and the Telegraph cross-post completed at 15:47, but zero older blog posts linked to the new asset. Internal linking from established authority pages directly passes PageRank and strengthens the new post's SEO footing — this is a higher-leverage move than another outreach packet while all curator/publisher lanes are inside active review windows.

All curator/outreach/publisher lanes already have active review windows — another outreach packet would be fake progress

Internal linking is fully executable from this environment — no external platform auth required
This is a genuine distribution lane improvement (SEO authority flow), not just another packet refresh
The comparison matrix already had its Telegraph cross-post and sitemap pings; internal links close the loop on owned-site discoverability
All 4 links verified live on ralphworkflow.com after deploy
